properties.Observation: There are no identifiable springs other than the springs that feed the lake. Deatails to the lake and details related to the development of the lake have been presented under format no. 07.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: NA

properties.Observation: There are no identifiable springs other than the springs that feed the lake. Deatails to the lake and details related to the development of the lake have been presented under format no. 07.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: NA

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Marking Reservation, Tree Planting and Development of Spring
properties.Observation: Water is obtained by crossing a side stream that joins the Gamameda stream. The water storage tank was constructed by World Vision in 2022. A water purification system needs to be built. About 20 families taken water for drinking and cultivation.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Construction of water treatment system.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Marking Reservation, Tree Planting and Conservation of the Spring
properties.Observation: Two water distribution tanks have been constructed, 13 families obtain water from tank 1 and 6 families from tank 2 for drinking and cultivation. Community says there is animal waste in the water.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Construction of water treatment system.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Development of Spring, Fixing covering net and Marking of public road
properties.Observation: A well 3.0m long, 3.0m wide and 3.0m deep is constructed and water is used for farming.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: No development is proposed.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Construction of side wall and Fixing covering net
properties.Observation: A water collecting pit and water storage tank has been constructed.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Providing covering net for water collecting pit and Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Construction of side wall and Fixing covering net
properties.Observation: A large number of springs are located in the same place. 12 wells are dug for 12 springs and water is obtained separately. Springs located in Halgran Oya Tea Estate and taken water for Vegetables cultivation and drinking
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: It is best to build one large tank, collect water in it, and distribute water through it. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areaca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Construction of side wall and Fixing covering net
properties.Observation: A large number of springs are located in the same place. 15 wells are dug for 15 springs and water is obtained separately. Springs located in Halgran Oya Tea Estate and taken water for  drinking
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: It is best to build one large tank, collect water in it, and distribute water through it. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areaca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Construction of side wall and Fixing covering net
properties.Observation: Springs located in Halgran Oya Tea Estate, A water collecting pit has been constructed.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: It is best to build water storage tank, collect water in it, and distribute water through it. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areaca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Construction of side wall and Fixing covering net
properties.Observation: A tank is being constructed at the location of the spring to protect the spring. A small water storage tank is alsa being constructed. This project can provide water to 36 families.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: A project that is currently under construction.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Development of Spring, Renovation of Existing water Tank and Distribution of drinking water
properties.Observation: A tank has been built, Water is leaking from the tank
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Existing tank should be repaired and Construction of fence around the water spring.

properties.Observation: Located in Samagipura reserve. A concrete wall is built to collect spring water and then send it to a water storage tank for distribution. About 60 families use water. The water treatment plant is not functioning and needs to be renovated.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Renovation of existing water treatment plant. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: An area of water lodging where several springs are located. People taken water informally using pipes.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areaca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: Located in Samagipura reserve. Spring water flowing along a canal and taken water using PVC pipes. About 40 families use water. Spring should be preserved. A new water storage tank should be built.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Construction of a water storage tank that is 2.40m long, 2.4m wide and 2.4m high. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: Located in st. Leonard's Estate.  Spring water flowing along a canal and Water is drawn into the storage tank using 50mm Ø PVC pipes. Bathing place has also been built using spring water. About 35 families use water. Spring should be preserved.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: Located in st. Leonard's Estate. Spring water is collected in a concrete pond that has been constructed.  Water is obtained for school use. A security fence has been built around the spring. Spring should be preserved.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areaca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: The spring is being preserved and a tank is being built to distribute water. But there are about 25 houses near the spring where people live. Wastewater is being added to spring water through household toilets.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Water samples should be tested. A proper water purification system should be developed.

properties.Observation: Located in st. Leonard's Estate. Spring water is collected in a tank that has been constructed.  An area of water lodging where several springs are located. Two water storage tanks have been constructed on high ground. ( 500 liter PVC tank and 2.4m x 2.4m x 1.5m concrete tank). Distribution is done after pumping water from the water collection tank at the source to the water storage tank. The pump is currently broken. About 30 families use water. Spring should be preserved.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Construction of cover slabs for water collecting tank. Repairing of a water pump. Renovation of existing water storage tank. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: Located in st. Leonard's Estate.  Spring water flowing along a canal Spring water is collected in a  concrete pond that has been constructed, About 75 families use water. Spring should be preserved.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Renovation of existing pond and provide covering net for it. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areaca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: Located in st. Leonard's Estate. Spring water is collected in a small concrete tank that has been constructed and taken to the 2 nos of 5000 liter PVC water storage tanks. One of the PVC tank has broken. About 35 families use water. Spring should be preserved.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Providing a new 5000 liter tank to replace for the broken PVC tank. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.

properties.Observation: Located in st. Leonard's Estate. It remains as a hole dug in the ground. Water is drawn into the storage tank using 50mm Ø PVC pipes. About 35 families use water. Water from  nearby springs is also collect to the existing one. Spring should be preserved. The turpentine trees grown in the above the springs should be removed and replace with suitable trees.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Construction of a water collection tank that is 3.0m long, 2.0m wide and 1.5m high at the location of the springs. Plants  such as kubuk, Bamboo and areca nut should be planted and conserved around springs.
